detail.description: Jake Meyers hits a ground-rule double (5) on a line drive to left-center field. Cam Smith scores.
Jake Meyers singles on a ground ball to shortstop Kevin McGonigle.
Jake Meyers singles on a ground ball to right fielder Carlos Cortes. Jose Altuve scores. LaMonte Wade Jr. to 3rd.
Jake Meyers singles on a fly ball to right fielder Carlos Cortes.
Jake Meyers doubles (4) on a line drive to center fielder Oneil Cruz.
Jake Meyers singles on a ground ball to center fielder Garrett Mitchell.
Jake Meyers singles on a ground ball to center fielder Garrett Mitchell.
Brewers challenged (tag play), call on the field was upheld: Jake Meyers singles on a line drive to right fielder Jake Bauers. Cam Smith scores.
Jake Meyers singles on a sharp ground ball to left fielder Jackson Chourio. Jeremy Peña to 2nd.
Jake Meyers doubles (3) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Jackson Chourio. Christian Walker scores. Braden Shewmake to 3rd.
Jake Meyers singles on a line drive to right fielder Wilyer Abreu.
Jake Meyers singles on a line drive to left fielder Roman Anthony. Cam Smith to 3rd.
Jake Meyers doubles (1) on a line drive to right fielder Jo Adell. Cam Smith scores. Yainer Diaz scores.
Jake Meyers singles on a line drive to left fielder Josh Lowe.
Jake Meyers homers (1) on a fly ball to left field.
Jake Meyers singles on a line drive to right fielder Carlos Cortes.
Jake Meyers singles on a ground ball to left fielder Tyler Soderstrom, deflected by third baseman Max Muncy.
Jake Meyers doubles (2) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Brenton Doyle. Yainer Diaz to 3rd.
Jake Meyers singles on a ground ball to center fielder Brenton Doyle.
Jake Meyers homers (3) on a fly ball to left center field.
Jake Meyers singles on a ground ball to shortstop Bobby Witt Jr.
Jake Meyers homers (2) on a fly ball to left field.
Jake Meyers singles on a ground ball to left fielder Ian Happ.
Jake Meyers singles on a sharp ground ball to center fielder Mike Trout. Joey Loperfido to 2nd.
Jake Meyers singles on a line drive to left fielder Riley Greene. Yainer Diaz to 2nd.
Jake Meyers singles on a line drive to right fielder Austin Martin.
